Properties.Name: model1
Properties.HelpText: The name of the first model you'd like to use.

Properties.Name: model2
Properties.HelpText: The name of the second model you'd like to use.

Properties.Name: model3
Properties.HelpText: The name of the third model you'd like to use.

Properties.Name: minPos
Properties.HelpText: The minimum position a model will spawn.

Properties.Name: maxPos
Properties.HelpText: The maximum position a model will spawn.

Properties.Name: maxRotation
Properties.HelpText: The maximum that a model can rotate randomly.

Properties.Name: minScale
Properties.HelpText: The minimum scale the models can have.

Properties.Name: maxScale
Properties.HelpText: The maximum scale the models can have.

Properties.Name: minObjects
Properties.HelpText: The minimum amount of models that can spawn.

Properties.Name: maxObjects
Properties.HelpText: The maximum amount of models that can spawn.
